contractCoverage.contract: Provider usage is SSOT: anchored total is calculateContextTokens(lastUsage) plus a heuristic trailing delta.
evidence: packages/coding-agent/test/agent-session-context-usage-ssot.test.ts: anchors on provider-reported total and estimates only trailing messages
packages/coding-agent/test/context-usage-ssot-redteam.test.ts: retains only heuristic deltas after a provider anchor

contractCoverage.contract: The heuristic is used only when there is no anchor and includes fixed system/tool/skill context.
evidence: packages/coding-agent/test/agent-session-context-usage-ssot.test.ts: full heuristic includes fixed context when assistants abort/error

contractCoverage.contract: Post-compaction unknown stays null/?; ACP omits usage_update; RPC preserves null.
evidence: packages/coding-agent/test/acp-agent.test.ts: omits ACP usage updates when the context count is unknown

packages/coding-agent/src/modes/shared/agent-wire/command-dispatch.ts:182-211 assigns contextUsage: session.getContextUsage() without transformation; packages/coding-agent/test/rpc-get-state-payload.test.ts:64-75 verifies get_state payload forwarding

contractCoverage.contract: The pre-prompt compaction estimator rejects usage anchors older than the latest compaction entry.
evidence: packages/coding-agent/test/context-usage-ssot-redteam.test.ts: timestamp-less stale assistant crosses the boundary
packages/coding-agent/src/session/agent-session.ts:11613-11622 uses messages[i].timestamp < boundaryTs; undefined < boundaryTs is false

contractCoverage.contract: All surfaces agree for the same session state.
evidence: packages/coding-agent/test/context-usage-cross-surface.test.ts: provider-anchor and unknown parity across status line, context panel, and context report
packages/coding-agent/test/context-usage-ssot-redteam.test.ts: provider total above window, no-model status fallback, and ACP zero-token emission

adversarialCases.scenario: A timestamp-less assistant that predates compaction is persisted again after the compaction entry.
adversarialCases.expected: The compaction boundary must reject the old provider anchor.
adversarialCases.notes: Observed provider_anchor with 150,000 tokens. The comparison in agent-session.ts is undefined < boundaryTs, which is false. Current typed message interfaces require timestamp and current message construction assigns Date.now(), but SessionManager loads message payloads from JSON without timestamp validation; malformed or legacy persisted payloads can therefore reach this path.

adversarialCases.scenario: A successful zero-usage assistant follows a positive post-compaction assistant.
adversarialCases.expected: Document current conservative behavior rather than use the earlier anchor without accounting for the later assistant.
adversarialCases.notes: Observed { tokens: null, percent: null, source: unknown }. The post-compaction gate stops at the zero-usage successful assistant and masks the earlier positive anchor. This is the known pre-existing edge; it avoids reporting an incomplete anchored total.

adversarialCases.scenario: Provider reports 300,000 tokens against a 200,000-token context window.
adversarialCases.expected: Render 150.0% without a crash and never produce negative reserve/free token counts.
adversarialCases.notes: Status line rendered 150.0%; provider-anchor breakdown used 300,000, freeTokens was 0, and context rendering completed.

adversarialCases.scenario: Status-line SegmentContext has no model and getContextUsage() returns undefined.
adversarialCases.expected: Use the heuristic fallback without crashing; render the no-model segment.
adversarialCases.notes: The real StatusLineComponent computed a positive heuristic token count with a zero context window and rendered no-model.

adversarialCases.scenario: computeContextBreakdown runs with heuristic and provider-anchor snapshots, including provider usage over the window.
adversarialCases.expected: autoCompactBufferTokens and freeTokens are never negative.
adversarialCases.notes: Both source paths produced non-negative reserve and free values; the over-window provider case clamps freeTokens to 0.

adversarialCases.scenario: ACP end-of-turn sees contextUsage.tokens equal to numeric 0.
adversarialCases.expected: Emit usage_update with used: 0; only null suppresses the update.
adversarialCases.notes: A real AcpAgent prompt emitted usage_update { size: 200000, used: 0 }. The implementation condition is contextUsage?.tokens != null at acp-agent.ts:2219-2230.

defectsFound.title: Missing message timestamps can bypass the latest-compaction anchor boundary.
defectsFound.impact: A stale provider-reported context total can be presented as a post-compaction provider anchor, violating SSOT provenance and potentially reporting a substantially incorrect token count/percent.
defectsFound.reachability: Normal current TypeScript construction is protected: UserMessage and AssistantMessage timestamp fields are required, and current AgentSession creators assign Date.now(). The persisted-session loader parses message payloads without validating timestamps, so malformed, manually edited, or legacy JSON can still reach the faulty JavaScript comparison.
defectsFound.recommendedFix: Treat a non-finite or missing timestamp as pre-boundary when a compaction boundary exists, or validate/normalize timestamps during persisted-session loading before estimating context usage.
